author: steve

patch.value: Upstream pm-cli issue tracked at github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/53
pm install npm:pm-changelog fails due to missing SDK dependency (upstream pm-cli#53)

When users install pm-changelog via pm install npm:pm-changelog, the extension fails to load with extension_load_failed_sdk_dependency_missing. pm-cli does not install node_modules for npm-backed extensions so @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk is unresolvable.
pm-cli fixes npm install to provide SDK dependency resolution or documents a workaround. pm install npm:pm-changelog works from a clean temp project without warnings.
cd into mktemp dir, pm init, pm install npm:pm-changelog --project, pm package doctor --project
pm install npm:pm-changelog loads extension and changelog command is available

value.author: steve
value.text: pm-cli#53 was closed without resolution on 2026-05-23 and reopened with fresh evidence on 2026-05-24.

value.author: steve
value.text: Upstream issue. No fix in pm-changelog without violating official SDK usage requirement.

value.author: steve
value.text: pm does not install npm dependencies when extracting an extension from npm. Local path installs include node_modules and work correctly.

message: Track upstream pm-cli npm install issue affecting pm-changelog

author: steve
message: Add reviewer, risk, confidence, release metadata

value.author: codex
value.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: pm-changelog package dependency metadata is current for @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29. Verified npm run check, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, npm run audit:prod, npm run changelog:full, npm run changelog:check, npm run release:check, and pm validate. This does not close the upstream pm-cli install-resolution issue tracked here; it records current package-side readiness evidence. Logs: /tmp/pm-changelog-*.log and /tmp/pm-active-*.tsv.

value.author: codex
value.text: 2026-05-29 CI follow-up: the GitHub runner had a fuller remote tag set than the local checkout, so npm run changelog:check correctly failed on main after the release-readiness push. Fetched origin tags with git fetch --force --tags, regenerated the full-history CHANGELOG.md with npm run changelog:full, and re-ran npm run changelog:check plus npm run release:check successfully before committing the generated correction.
